_provenance: Parallel passage groupings from Horley (2021) Appendix; variant attestations collated from Barthel (1958) corpus. Adapted from Souza (2022) rongorongo/horley_parallels.csv (MIT licence). CRITICAL: This structure documents MULTI-TABLET attestations of the SAME passage — the primary signal for Zone C alignment scoring.
_description: Structured parallel passage groups with full tablet provenance. Each passage has a canonical form and multiple variant attestations from DIFFERENT tablets. This enables cross-tablet passage alignment in Zone C.
_critical_note: For Zone C's parallel passage scoring to function, this must contain passages with n_variants >= 2 (the same passage attested on at least 2 tablets). Currently empty — needs population from Horley (2021) Appendix using cross-tablet passage matching.

_variant_schema.form: list[string] — ordered Barthel codes; glyph 200 retained and tagged
_variant_schema.start_position: int — 1-based start position on tablet, -1 if unknown

_population_steps: 1. Start with horley_parallels.csv (146 passages, one tablet per passage)
2. Cross-reference Horley (2021) Appendix to identify same passage across different tablets
3. Group variant attestations under single passage_id with n_variants >= 2
4. Convert Horley/CEIPP codes to Barthel codes using SignCatalog.horley_to_barthel()
6. Validate that each passage has >= 2 variants on different tablets
7. Use load_parallel_variants_json() to test loading into ParallelPassage objects
